'''Tammala''' was an [[Ewok/Legends|Ewok]] hermit and inventor present on the [[Endor/Legends|Forest Moon]] before the destruction of the [[Death Star II/Legends|Second Death Star]]. He was exiled from [[Bright Tree Village/Legends|Bright Tree Village]] by [[Logray/Legends|Logray]] for his experiments with gliders. After the Ewoks agreed to aid the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]], a few members of the Strike Force were taken to see Tammala by [[Wicket Wystri Warrick/Legends|Wicket]].<ref name="RESB" />

He lived in a hut perched high up in one of Endor's enormous [[Tree/Legends|trees]]. He was easily convinced to aid in the preparations for the attack and trained other Ewoks in flying the primitive flying machines.<ref name="RESB" /> Tammala shared his name with a [[Tammala (spirit)|wind spirit]] in Ewok mythology.<ref name="GCG">''[[Galactic Campaign Guide]]''</ref>
